description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a boxy, geometric design and a deep blue upholstered finish. The seat and backrest are thickly padded, providing comfort and support, while the armrests are integrated into the main frame, forming a continuous, angular silhouette. The chair sits atop a sturdy black metal base with five spokes, each ending in a caster wheel for easy mobility. The central support column is cylindrical and likely adjustable, though no adjustment levers are visible. The upholstery appears to be a soft, matte fabric, and the overall construction suggests a blend of comfort and durability. This chair would be suitable for office, home, or public urban environments.
description: A boxy, blue upholstered swivel chair with integrated armrests and a black five-spoke caster base. The design is modern, comfortable, and mobile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, padded seat, straight backrest, and integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's angular profile and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the symmetrical armrest design.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the chair's solid, continuous arm and back structure.
attribute_central_support_column: A black cylindrical metal column, likely steel, connecting the seat to the five-spoke caster base; appears fixed with no visible telescoping or decorative features.
attribute_seat_back_design: Rectangular, medium-height backrest with thick padding, straight edges, and blue fabric upholstery; no visible patterns or cutouts.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated, boxy armrests upholstered in blue fabric, forming a continuous extension of the seat and backrest; attached directly to the main frame.
